completed_tasks.name: Add reinstall completion mode and --force positional skipping
completed_tasks.progress: data.ts has reinstall mode, installed-only filtering, and booleanFlags positional skipping implemented; provider tests for installed-only and --force positional skipping were added but not validated yet.

completed_tasks.name: Add provider branches for reinstall refs and --force flags
completed_tasks.progress: provider.ts has reinstall in TOP_LEVEL_SUBCOMMANDS, reinstall-only --force flag completion, boolean flag positional hookup, and reinstall ref branch with allowMarketplaceOnly; provider tests for top-level rei, @marketplace, multi-marketplace half, and --force-only-for-reinstall were added but not validated yet.

remaining_tasks.name: Finish and validate provider branch coverage
Run Plan 09-03 validation, write 09-03-SUMMARY.md, pre-commit, and commit
Execute Plan 09-04 docs, final validation, and traceability

decisions.decision: Reinstall completions use the same installed-only plugin-ref mode as update and uninstall.
decisions.rationale: Reinstall is installed-only and must not suggest absent or unavailable plugins.

decisions.decision: extractPositionals now accepts explicit booleanFlags and only reinstall passes ["--force"].
decisions.rationale: This lets reinstall --force <TAB> complete refs while preserving existing list/filter behavior for arbitrary flags.

decisions.decision: Marketplace-only reinstall completions use allowMarketplaceOnly: true like update.
decisions.rationale: Phase 09 D-16 requires @marketplace targets for marketplace-wide reinstall.

notes: Plan 09-01 committed as eb15d03 feat(09-01): add bulk reinstall orchestrator.
Plan 09-02 committed as 2f0a833 feat(09-02): wire reinstall edge command.
Plan 09-03 is partially implemented but unvalidated and uncommitted.
Task 3 failure-semantics tests still need to be added: soft-fail preserving healthy reinstall completions and state boom propagation.
Historical placeholder scan reports many old phase files with TBD/placeholder text, but no Phase 09 placeholder file was found.

.gitignore, CLAUDE.md, .planning/STATE.md, and .planning/config.json are unrelated/pre-existing or GSD-generated modifications; do not accidentally include them in the Plan 09-03 code commit unless intentionally committing docs/state separately.
next_action: Resume Plan 09-03 by adding Task 3 failure-semantics tests to tests/edge/completions/provider.test.ts, then run node --test tests/edge/completions/provider.test.ts and npm run typecheck; fix any failures before writing 09-03-SUMMARY.md and committing only the Plan 09-03 files.
context_notes: The implementation direction is straightforward: data.ts already supports reinstall mode and explicit boolean flag skipping; provider.ts already treats reinstall as a top-level command, ref-completion command, marketplace-only target command, and reinstall-only --force flag owner. The immediate uncertainty is test fallout from the partial provider.test.ts edits, especially sorted top-level expectations and exact completion value prefixes. Validate before doing more refactors.
